name: Pear Almond Clafouti with Red Wine Glaze
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Whole wheat pastry flour (or unbleached white flour)
2 Firm pears, cored and sliced lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
CLAFOUTI: Preheat oven to 375°F. Combine flour with 1 cup almond meal and baking powder in a bowl. Mix soy milk, fruit juice concentrate, and vanilla into the flour mixture. Pour into a 9-inch shallow cake or quiche pan and mix well. Combine remaining 1/2 cup almond meal with 2/3 cup apple juice concentrate and lemon juice; spread over dough. Arrange pear slices on top in a spiral pattern. Bake for 35 minutes.
GLAZE: Combine wine and fruit juice concentrate in a small pot and heat to a simmer. Dissolve arrowroot or cornstarch in an equal amount of water and whisk into the wine. Cook until thickened. Brush hot glaze over pears. Serve hot or warm.
